title: The Island Watches in Fear
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, Unknown person #5. The core beat is the island watches in fear.
scene: The scene follows the island watches in fear, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GRRRR ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll just have to beat you up first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stop that, you two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, boss... are you gonna leave anyone behind here in the Palace?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No... I don't think there's much need.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Ryuguau Palace is an imperetrable fortress ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leave a few men to open the gates when we return. That should be enough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wouldn't want the King to get locked out of his own palace, after all, would we...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gyaha hahah!! You got that right!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey, boss! What about those three straw hats...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ughh... my wounds from fighting that swordsman are still aching...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: My energy steroids are running out ... Bring me some more!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: those three are only humans. They'll drown to death sooner or later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if somebody comes to save them, they'll never get into the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I want to know is, how are things going with the new residents coming from the fish-man district?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like the migration is already underway...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: good. There'll be plenty of space for them soon enough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who flee the country.... those who are killed... their residences can be readied for new occupants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Crack!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will make this into a fine country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...filled only with proud, human-hating citizens. Jaha hahahah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sweet factory town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Daruma- Saaaan!! What are you...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: MMMMMMMLM MLRGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's chewing up the stone factory walls...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are that man's teeth made of...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My fangs are thirsting for more!! Kyakkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkkk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GRunch!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's wrong with you people, bringing me cappucino and sweets?! You call this a snack?! What am I, an office lady?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: W... we're sorry, Daruma- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want me to tear your flesh apart?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: My favourite food is fish-man Bones, you know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll bear that in mind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...well, whatever. I'll be able to feast on the Royals and their soldiers before long, anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going on ahead to GYoncord Plaza!! Everyone's gotta be there - don't be late, you got that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what shall we do with the citizens?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kyakkya Kkyah...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No need to do anything. Each of 'em already oughita know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...what kind of fate awaits them....!! kyakyahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Including hordy himself, four of the leading members of the new fish-man pirates are shark fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Another is a giant squid...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...and they've hired the greatest swordsman on Fish-Man Island as a bodyguard ...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: But on our side, we have the three Neptune brothers to rely on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm sure the princes will pull through!!!

summary: The Island Watches in Fear. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
